fields.acceptance_criteria: Normal scan and force scan share user-visible search/list/get semantics; deleted, moved, and removed-root tickets are reconciled in both index and search; stale drift emits diagnostics; focused storage regressions cover deleted-on-disk, removed-root, moved-path, and stale-search-doc cases
fields.title: [ticket-api] Reconcile aggregate scan, prune, and search visibility
